root_text.an10.134:1.2: Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha, bhāsissāmī”ti.
root_text.an10.134:1.3: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ.
root_text.an10.134:2.2: Micchādiṭṭhi, micchāsaṅkappo, micchāvācā, micchākammanto, micchāājīvo, micchāvāyāmo, micchāsati, micchāsamādhi, micchāñāṇaṁ, micchāvimutti—
root_text.an10.134:2.5: Sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati, sammāsamādhi, sammāñāṇaṁ, sammāvimutti—

translation_text.an10.134:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you what is good and what is not good.
translation_text.an10.134:1.2: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.”
translation_text.an10.134:2.2: Wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, wrong immersion, wrong knowledge, and wrong freedom.
translation_text.an10.134:2.3: This is called what is not good.
translation_text.an10.134:2.5: Right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.an10.134:2.6: This is called what is good.”
